patches.before_text: "Processing" means any operation performed on Personal Data, including collection, access, storage, hosting, organization, retrieval, transmission, analysis, deletion, and return.
patches.after_text: Vendor will process personal data only on Customer's documented instructions and as necessary to provide the services; administrative notice of the processing is due within 10 days. Vendor updates the instruction log every 45 days and supplies deletion confirmation within 9 days after completion.
patches.ground_span: Vendor will process personal data only on Customer's documented instructions and as necessary to provide the services; administrative notice of the processing is due within 10 days. Vendor updates the instruction log every 45 days and supplies deletion confirmation within 9 days after completion.

plant_position.fallback_text: "Processing" means any operation performed on Personal Data, including collection, access, storage, hosting, organization, retrieval, transmission, analysis, deletion, and return.

patches.before_text: Vendor may use subprocessors only with Customer's prior written approval or through an agreed notice-and-objection process. Vendor will bind each subprocessor to written obligations at least as protective as this DPA for Personal Data and remains responsible for each subprocessor's acts and omissions.
patches.after_text: Vendor may appoint a subprocessor through Customer prior approval; Vendor need not impose equivalent written data-protection duties, although it remains the contracting party. Vendor responds to a substantiated objection within 10 days and reviews subprocessor compliance every 9 months.
patches.ground_span: Vendor may appoint a subprocessor through Customer prior approval; Vendor need not impose equivalent written data-protection duties, although it remains the contracting party. Vendor responds to a substantiated objection within 10 days and reviews subprocessor compliance every 9 months.
patches.expected_redline_text: Vendor may use subprocessors only with Customer's prior approval or the agreed notice-and-objection process, must bind each subprocessor to written obligations at least as protective as this DPA, and remains liable for subprocessor performance.

plant_position.fallback_text: Vendor may use subprocessors only with Customer's prior written approval or through an agreed notice-and-objection process. Vendor will bind each subprocessor to written obligations at least as protective as this DPA for Personal Data and remains responsible for each subprocessor's acts and omissions.

patches.after_text: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: Vendor will send an initial written alert about a Personal Data Breach within 5 business days after discovering it only if forensic review confirms outbound extraction.
patches.ground_span: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: Vendor will send an initial written alert about a Personal Data Breach within 5 business days after discovering it only if forensic review confirms outbound extraction.
patches.expected_redline_text: Vendor will notify Customer without undue delay and in any event within 48 hours after discovering a Personal Data Breach.

plant_position.fallback_text: Vendor will notify Customer without undue delay and in any event within 48 hours after discovering a Personal Data Breach.

patches.before_text: Vendor will notify Customer without undue delay and in any event within 48 hours after discovering a Personal Data Breach.
patches.after_text: Vendor will notify Customer without undue delay and in any event within 48 hours after discovering a Personal Data Breach.

patches.after_text: Vendor need not notify Customer of a personal-data breach until ten business days after Vendor completes its internal investigation.
patches.ground_span: Vendor need not notify Customer of a personal-data breach until ten business days after Vendor completes its internal investigation.
patches.expected_redline_text: Vendor will notify Customer without undue delay and in any event within 48 hours after discovering a personal-data breach.

patches.before_text: Vendor will provide an annual SOC 2 Type II report, responses to security and privacy questionnaires within 10 business days, and written control mappings needed to demonstrate compliance with this DPA.
patches.after_text: Vendor will provide an annual SOC 2 Type II report, responses to security and privacy questionnaires within 10 business days, and written control mappings needed to demonstrate compliance with this DPA. For clarity, the annual SOC 2 Type II report may satisfy routine assurance requests, while incident and reasonable-cause follow-up rights remain available.
patches.ground_span: Vendor will provide an annual SOC 2 Type II report, responses to security and privacy questionnaires within 10 business days, and written control mappings needed to demonstrate compliance with this DPA. For clarity, the annual SOC 2 Type II report may satisfy routine assurance requests, while incident and reasonable-cause follow-up rights remain available.

patches.before_text: This DPA begins with the first Processing of Personal Data and remains in effect for the duration of the services and for as long as Vendor processes or retains Personal Data on behalf of Customer.
patches.after_text: This addendum begins on signature and expires automatically one year later unless the parties sign a renewal.
patches.ground_span: This addendum begins on signature and expires automatically one year later unless the parties sign a renewal.
patches.expected_redline_text: This DPA begins with the first Processing of Personal Data and remains in effect for the duration of the services and for as long as Vendor processes or retains Personal Data on behalf of Customer.

plant_position.fallback_text: This DPA begins with the first Processing of Personal Data and remains in effect for the duration of the services and for as long as Vendor processes or retains Personal Data on behalf of Customer.

patches.before_text: For up to 30 days after termination, Vendor will provide export files, transfer coordination, and deletion support for secure transition, return, or deletion.
patches.after_text: For up to 30 days after termination, Vendor will provide export files, transfer coordination, and deletion support for secure transition, return, or deletion. The counterparty confirms that this requirement is accepted without qualification.
patches.ground_span: For up to 30 days after termination, Vendor will provide export files, transfer coordination, and deletion support for secure transition, return, or deletion. The counterparty confirms that this requirement is accepted without qualification.

plant_position.fallback_text: For up to 30 days after termination, Vendor will provide export files, transfer coordination, and deletion support for secure transition, return, or deletion.
